item.title: How to Retrieve Deleted Files from Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: How to Retrieve Deleted Files from Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardsrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
How to Retrieve Deleted Files from Mac
(Utilities)
Technically advanced How to Retrieve Deleted Files from Mac software facilitates users to efficiently recover all deleted or misplaced valuable data including cute baby birthday digital photographs, memorable images, priceless snapshots, favorite pictures and other unforgettable moments stored in any hard disk drive or removable storage media device. Mac Digital Pictures Recovery application allows users to conveniently regain entire erased files and folders misplaced due Virus or worm attack, Logically corrupted or formatted removable storage media device, Power failure, Formatted or reformatted hard drives, Software or hardware malfunction, unintentionally deletion, Corrupted hard disk partitions, Improper handling or storage media device and others crucial data loss reasons. Digital picture restoration program for Macintosh offers enhanced feature for users to simply recoup deleted digital images by using advanced disk scanning methodology and save them at particular location in PC or laptop in simplified manner. How to Retrieve Deleted Files from Mac software quickly restore overall deleted data even “Drive not detected” or “Drive not recognized” error messages are displayed on computer system or laptop screen. GUI feature offer users to easily work with How to Retrieve Deleted Files from Mac application without taking any technical knowledge or expert training for executing utility. Features: * Innovative How to Retrieve Deleted Files from Mac utility allows users to easily recover entire removed or misplaced important data saved in hard disk or removable USB drive. * How to Retrieve Deleted Files from Mac software frequently restore misplaced data from various types of removable storage devices such as Pen drive, memory card, zip drive and others. * Expertise How to Retrieve Deleted Files from Mac application simply regain overall accidentally erased data saved in various file formats.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardsrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Professional digital image recovery program is completely capable to recover accidentally deleted memorable photographs, video film from different memory card storage devices. Cost effective Digital Camera Data Recovery software supports extraordinary disk scanning technique to search and rescue entire deleted or inaccessible music file, images, pictures stored in different memory stick. Photo recovery program facilitates to undelete erased image and snapshots due to some data lost causes such as improper device handling, power failure, formatted digital camera, virus infected storage device, etc. Affordable digital memory card recovery tool provides user friendly GUI so that non technical user can easily recover precious deleted snapshots, photo or audio songs from digital camera. Award winning digital photograph recovery software is compatible to rescue accidentally deleted photographs stored in different major brands camera like Sony, Casio, Nikon, Panasonic, etc. Freeware Digital Camera Data Recovery software can be downloaded from www.memorycarddatarecovery.net which facilitates demo version to understand entire available features. Wonderful digital picture recovery tool facilitates to recover lost or erased image saved in various file format including jpeg, png, doc, etc. Features: *Digital Camera Data Recovery software provides facility to recover deleted file due to some data lost reasons including virus infected, inaccessible digital device, logically formatted or corrupted storage device, etc. *Digital Camera image recovery tool allows user to restore even when memory card is pulled out and even camera is in working mode. *Effective image retrieval program is compatible with overall major brands digital camera to recover deleted photographs or pictures. *Professional picture restoration software enables user to recover entire logically deleted images, audio or video songs, snapshots from digital camera.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Camera Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Professional digital image recovery program is completely capable to recover accidentally deleted memorable photographs, video film from different memory card storage devices. Cost effective Digital Camera Data Recovery software supports extraordinary disk scanning technique to search and rescue entire deleted or inaccessible music file, images, pictures stored in different memory stick. Photo recovery program facilitates to undelete erased image and snapshots due to some data lost causes such as improper device handling, power failure, formatted digital camera, virus infected storage device, etc. Affordable digital memory card recovery tool provides user friendly GUI so that non technical user can easily recover precious deleted snapshots, photo or audio songs from digital camera. Award winning digital photograph recovery software is compatible to rescue accidentally deleted photographs stored in different major brands camera like Sony, Casio, Nikon, Panasonic, etc. Freeware Digital Camera Data Recovery software can be downloaded from www.memorycarddatarecovery.net which facilitates demo version to understand entire available features. [read more]

Digital Camera Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Professional digital image recovery program is completely capable to recover accidentally deleted memorable photographs, video film from different memory card storage devices. Cost effective Digital Camera Data Recovery software supports extraordinary disk scanning technique to search and rescue entire deleted or inaccessible music file, images, pictures stored in different memory stick. Photo recovery program facilitates to undelete erased image and snapshots due to some data lost causes such as improper device handling, power failure, formatted digital camera, virus infected storage device, etc. Affordable digital memory card recovery tool provides user friendly GUI so that non technical user can easily recover precious deleted snapshots, photo or audio songs from digital camera. Award winning digital photograph recovery software is compatible to rescue accidentally deleted photographs stored in different major brands camera like Sony, Casio, Nikon, Panasonic, etc. Freeware Digital Camera Data Recovery software can be downloaded from www.memorycarddatarecovery.net which facilitates demo version to understand entire available features. Wonderful digital picture recovery tool facilitates to recover lost or erased image saved in various file format including jpeg, png, doc, etc. Features: *Digital Camera Data Recovery software provides facility to recover deleted file due to some data lost reasons including virus infected, inaccessible digital device, logically formatted or corrupted storage device, etc. *Digital Camera image recovery tool allows user to restore even when memory card is pulled out and even camera is in working mode. *Effective image retrieval program is compatible with overall major brands digital camera to recover deleted photographs or pictures. *Professional picture restoration software enables user to recover entire logically deleted images, audio or video songs, snapshots from digital camera.

item.title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* CD-ROM music player
* CD-R music burner
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]
item.description:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.

* Music radio streamer

* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist

* CD-R music burner
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* CD-ROM music player
* CD-R music burner
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]

item.title: Principia [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Principia [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: rollerozxa
item.itunes:summary:
Principia
(Various Games)
Principia is a physics-based sandbox building game. Build and play advanced contraptions, circuiting, minigames, robot adventures and more.
The sandbox contains 200+ different objects ranging from basic wooden building blocks to circuitry, electrical and mechanical components, small robots you can control and fight against, and a LuaScript object featuring Lua scripting that can interact with the world. Build a controllable car, a calculator or make your own game with circuitry or in Lua.

The Principia community site contains tens of thousands of creative levels made by players like you, from impressive contraptions to amusing games all for you to browse through and play. If something really peaks your interest, open the level in the sandbox to see how it ticks. What will you create in the sandbox?

Principia started out as a paid proprietary game developed during 2013-2014 before being abandoned due to financial issues. Now the game is an open source project since 2022 developed by the same community who fell in love with it back in the day, free for anyone to play well into the future.
[read more]
item.description:
Principia
(Various Games)
Principia is a physics-based sandbox building game. Build and play advanced contraptions, circuiting, minigames, robot adventures and more.
The sandbox contains 200+ different objects ranging from basic wooden building blocks to circuitry, electrical and mechanical components, small robots you can control and fight against, and a LuaScript object featuring Lua scripting that can interact with the world. Build a controllable car, a calculator or make your own game with circuitry or in Lua.

The Principia community site contains tens of thousands of creative levels made by players like you, from impressive contraptions to amusing games all for you to browse through and play. If something really peaks your interest, open the level in the sandbox to see how it ticks. What will you create in the sandbox?

Principia started out as a paid proprietary game developed during 2013-2014 before being abandoned due to financial issues. Now the game is an open source project since 2022 developed by the same community who fell in love with it back in the day, free for anyone to play well into the future.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Principia
(Various Games)
Principia is a physics-based sandbox building game. Build and play advanced contraptions, circuiting, minigames, robot adventures and more.
The sandbox contains 200+ different objects ranging from basic wooden building blocks to circuitry, electrical and mechanical components, small robots you can control and fight against, and a LuaScript object featuring Lua scripting that can interact with the world. Build a controllable car, a calculator or make your own game with circuitry or in Lua.

The Principia community site contains tens of thousands of creative levels made by players like you, from impressive contraptions to amusing games all for you to browse through and play. If something really peaks your interest, open the level in the sandbox to see how it ticks. What will you create in the sandbox?

Principia started out as a paid proprietary game developed during 2013-2014 before being abandoned due to financial issues. Now the game is an open source project since 2022 developed by the same community who fell in love with it back in the day, free for anyone to play well into the future.
[read more]

item.title: Android Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Android Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardsrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Android Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Technically advance and highly interactive data revival utility regains all kind of corrupted audio, video clips, screenshots, photographs etc from logically erased android based storage media within less turnaround time. Are you looking for solution to bring back your precious picture collection? Download flexible Android Files Recovery Software to restore entire missing text document, audio/video clips, music files, digital images, snapshots etc from at safe or secure location on computer system without any external help.

[read more]
item.description:
Android Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Technically advance and highly interactive data revival utility regains all kind of corrupted audio, video clips, screenshots, photographs etc from logically erased android based storage media within less turnaround time. item.content:encoded:
Android Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Technically advance and highly interactive data revival utility regains all kind of corrupted audio, video clips, screenshots, photographs etc from logically erased android based storage media within less turnaround time. Are you looking for solution to bring back your precious picture collection? Download flexible Android Files Recovery Software to restore entire missing text document, audio/video clips, music files, digital images, snapshots etc from at safe or secure location on computer system without any external help.

[read more]

item.title: Ads Regex [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Ads Regex [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ramanveerji
item.itunes:summary:
Ads Regex
(Utilities)
Our Ads Regex app is the ultimate tool for removing ads from your favorite Android apps and games with just a few taps. To make our app more interesting we have added more patches for you to choose from and play with your apps.
How It Works
Ads Regex utilizes regular expressions (regex) to target and block ad-related content within apps. With an awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns, the app can identify and remove various types of ads, including banner ads, pop-ups, and video ads.
Features
* Simple and intuitive interface
* No root access required
* No permissions required
* Fully offline
* Completely free with no in-app purchases
* Awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns
* Block various types of ads with the regex patterns
* Added several other patches to make the app more interesting
[read more]
item.description:
Ads Regex

Our Ads Regex app is the ultimate tool for removing ads from your favorite Android apps and games with just a few taps. To make our app more interesting we have added more patches for you to choose from and play with your apps.

Ads Regex utilizes regular expressions (regex) to target and block ad-related content within apps. With an awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns, the app can identify and remove various types of ads, including banner ads, pop-ups, and video ads.

* Simple and intuitive interface
* No root access required
* No permissions required
* Fully offline
* Completely free with no in-app purchases
* Awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns
* Block various types of ads with the regex patterns
* Added several other patches to make the app more interesting

Ads Regex utilizes regular expressions (regex) to target and block ad-related content within apps. With an awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns, the app can identify and remove various types of ads, including banner ads, pop-ups, and video ads.
Features

* No permissions required
* Fully offline
* Completely free with no in-app purchases
* Awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns
* Block various types of ads with the regex patterns

item.title: Arch Mirror Changer [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Arch Mirror Changer [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Arch Mirror Changer
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron again
i made a arch mirror changer

you can change to testing repos or unstable or back to normal

simply extract tar.gz and run the .bin file in konsole
with command sudo python nameoffile.bin
[read more]
item.description:
Arch Mirror Changer
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron again
i made a arch mirror changer

you can change to testing repos or unstable or back to normal

simply extract tar.gz and run the .bin file in konsole
with command sudo python nameoffile.bin
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Arch Mirror Changer
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron again
i made a arch mirror changer

you can change to testing repos or unstable or back to normal

simply extract tar.gz and run the .bin file in konsole
with command sudo python nameoffile.bin
[read more]

item.title: Debian Mirror Changer [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Debian Mirror Changer [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Debian Mirror Changer
(Utilities)

hello world it me aaron or claudemods again
simply making your day easier if this is what your looking for
all has been tested works well

here is a script with
5 options to change debians mirrors
bookworm
trixie
sid
update
upgrade

v1.01 10/07/2024
new pyqt5 application
plushed it up a bit
simply run from konsole
sudo python3 nameoffile.bin
new update and upgrade options
now UTF8 standard for konsoles


if your a naughty forker
edit and republish as you wish
i have a template
please note the template has problems you will need to fix
problem 1 the functions take two long
though i did write the script
not sure if it works properly i exited konsole
when i saw functions taking long

[read more]

sudo python3 nameoffile.bin

now UTF8 standard for konsoles

when i saw functions taking long
